Name: Columbia One
Description:
The Columbia One Handle is designed to work with your Columbia products universally. From the Nail Spotters and Angleheads, to the Rollers and the Corner Boxes, the One system allows you to lighten your load and still utilize all the finishing tools you love. Add a Tomalock adaptor and you can even use this handle with Flat Boxes if necessary.  This One handle is all you’ll need.

FEATURES:

  • Comes in two fixed lengths (4′ and 18″) and a 3 – 5′ extendible version
  • AHA Adaptor needed to use with Angleheads
  • Handmade from U.S. billet aluminum and steel components
  • Machined in our state of the art facility in Canada
  • Hard anodized tube
  • Comfort grips
  • Thickest, strongest and lightest handle on the market

Name: The Matrix Box Handles
Description:
The Columbia Matrix Flat Box Handle is lightweight and all mechanical. With a 90 degree grip, the Matrix gives you increased control over your box. These handles are durable and extremely long lasting, all while maintaining the comfort and ease of use that you’re used to with the Columbia brand of tools. The Columbia Matrix mechanical flat box handle is made of all billet aluminum, ensuring a long life.

FEATURES:

  • Now available in 3 sizes!
  • Fully mechanical brake
  • 90 degree grip allows for better control over the box
  • First Flat Box Handle handmade solely from U.S. billet aluminum
  • Sizes extend: 29″ to 39″ (MHS), 40″ to 60″ (MH), and 56″ to 76″ (MHL)
  • Machined in our state of the art facility in Canada
  • Ergonomic handle grip for easy brake pressure
  • Fits all Flat Box brands

Description:
The Columbia Long Extendible Handle is a 1 and 1/4″ thick design pipe. These handles are durable and extremely long lasting, all while maintaining the comfort and ease of use that you’re used to with the Columbia brand of tools. The Columbia Long Extendible Handle is not only the lightest on the market, but also the strongest, ensuring a long life.

REACHLINE Extendible Handles are perfect when you just need an extra foot, or four. They also work great in smaller spaces when you need a little less length. You can adjust for your working conditions on the fly.

  • For safety reasons, this handle is not compatible with the Corner Flusher Box

    steel components
  • Machined in our state of the art facility in Canada
  • Hard anodized tube
  • Comfort grips

Name: Closet Monster Flat Box Handle
Description:
The Columbia Closet Monster Flat Box Handle is a 1 and 1/4″ thick design pipe. These handles are durable and extremely long lasting, all while maintaining the comfort and ease of use that you’re used to with the Columbia brand of tools. The Columbia Closet Monster is not only the lightest on the market, but also the strongest, ensuring a long life.

The Closet Monster is especially useful for boxing tight areas where a longer handle will not fit. At approximately 19 inches in length, this short handle is a great option for closets and other small spaces. An adjustable wing-nut on the head will allow you to fix the box to your desired angle.

Features:

    steel components
  • Machined in our state of the art facility in Canada
  • Hard anodized tube
